creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 207706
v2

(In reply to freebsdbugs from comment #3)
> unsupported call from graphics shader of function llvm.SI.load.const.v4i32

Thanks. It makes the fix obvious. I've also looked at HAVE_LLVM >= 0x0800.
